message:
refactor: unify pretool-hook into claudecode hook command

Merge PreToolUse handling into the existing claudecode hook command
so all hook events (PreToolUse, SessionEnd, Stop) use the same CLI
entry point and dispatch based on hook_event_name.

🔮 View transcript: https://vibeinsights.dev/s/40c7752c-c8a5-402e-b9e2-e6843df0301f
